technical_migration.migration_note: Fixture successor preserving reviewed Phase 3 effective-state information for Module 4.1 contract validation.

records.effective_text_en: For monoclonal-antibody testing, expression of the desired epitope remains central to species relevance. An epitope-negative species may still have some relevance for toxicity assessment if comparable unintended tissue cross-reactivity to humans is demonstrated. However, assessment of tissue cross-reactivity in animal tissues has limited value for species selection and TCR studies can be used only in specific cases where other approaches cannot demonstrate a pharmacologically relevant species. When unexpected binding occurs in human tissues, selected animal tissues can provide supplemental information, but TCR using a full panel of animal tissues is not recommended.
records.synthesis_rationale: This EffectiveRecord represents one operative proposition from the reviewed narrows mapping ich_s6_r1.amend.004. Parent records ich_s6_r1.kr.part1.3_3.004 and ich_s6_r1.kr.part1.3_3.005 supply the monoclonal-antibody epitope-expression criterion and the conditional relevance of an epitope-negative species when comparable unintended tissue cross-reactivity to humans is demonstrated. Parent Conditions ich_s6_r1.cond.part1.3_3.002 and ich_s6_r1.cond.part1.3_3.003 remain material to that scope. Addendum records ich_s6_r1.kr.part2.2_1.007 and ich_s6_r1.kr.part2.2_1.008 narrow the role of animal-tissue TCR to limited species-selection value and specific cases where other approaches cannot demonstrate a pharmacologically relevant species. Note 1 records ich_s6_r1.kr.part2.notes.005 and ich_s6_r1.kr.part2.notes.014 limit full-panel animal TCR and permit selected-animal-tissue evaluation only as conditional supplemental information when unexpected binding occurs in human tissues. The effective text preserves 'can be used' and does not normalize it to 'may'.

representation_limitations.limitation_text: Cross-reference ich_s6_r1.xref.part2.2_1.001 has raw text '(see Note 1)' and target_id=null because model 0.2.0 cannot resolve note-level targets. The linked Note 1 source unit ich_s6_r1.su.part2.notes.note1.004 and operative Note 1 records are included, so this is a representation limitation rather than absence of reviewed context.
